item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 1h Sounds like after almost four years we’re on alert for big LIV news, and I can’t help but w
item.description: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 1h Sounds like after almost four years we’re on alert for big LIV news, and I can’t help but wonder how it might relate to the DPWT, and whether Rahm suddenly seeming quite sure all his stuff would be fine might relate to some kind of agreement there. I hope not, but we’ll see. 6 1 17 6 mil

item.title: chambleebrandel: Brandel Chamblee @chambleebrandel · 3h LIV is funded by the Saudis who want to buy the success of the west and pretend t
item.description:
Brandel Chamblee @chambleebrandel · 3h LIV is funded by the Saudis who want to buy the success of the west and pretend they are surrogate to that success… TGL is literally funded by the people that create the success that the Saudis want to buy, because they can’t produce it. Cita Stable Genius @StableGeniustm · 4h En respuesta a @chambleebrandel The same commentators who criticize the @livgolf_league at every opportunity actively support the @TGL like it’s a legitimate golf league.
The hypocrisy is astounding. 17 4 107 25 mil

item.title:
KylePorterNS: Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 4h As has been pointed out, I am a moron.
You would have 20 top 10s, six wins and also hav
item.description:
Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 4h As has been pointed out, I am a moron.
You would have 20 top 10s, six wins and also have gone to three playoffs. Still pretty insane. Cita Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 11h If you beat Rory *and* Scottie at each of the last 20 majors, you would have finished.
1st (Masters) 1st (Open) 6th 1st (PGA) 1st (Masters) 6th 1st (U.S. Open) 7th 1st (Masters) 5th 1st (U.S. Open) 1st (PGA) 9th 2nd 1st (U.S. Open) 7th 1st (Masters) 7th 6th 7th
You would have 1 42 25 mil

item.title: chambleebrandel: Brandel Chamblee @chambleebrandel · 5h It should be Justin Leonard. Cita LKD @LukeKerrDineen · 14h U.S. Ryder Cup Team:
item.description:
Brandel Chamblee @chambleebrandel · 5h It should be Justin Leonard. Cita LKD @LukeKerrDineen · 14h U.S. Ryder Cup Team:
*still no idea who will be captain*
Meanwhile, European Ryder Cup team: 45 5 129 46 mil

item.title: JustinRayGolf: Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 4h En respuesta a @chambleebrandel Can our fellow Texan flip the script on alternate shot r
item.description: Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 4h En respuesta a @chambleebrandel Can our fellow Texan flip the script on alternate shot results… like, say the U.S. Solheim Cup team has done the last two Cups? 5 2 mil

item.title: KVanValkenburg: Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 5h Little early. But not wrong? 12 2 213 28 mil
item.description: Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 5h Little early. But not wrong? 12 2 213 28 mil
